name: compliance catalog: security-baseline subset includes slsa, owasp-asvs, iso-27001-a14, iso-27017 (§5 C-1)
command: j="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" && grep -qE '^- id: slsa\s*$' "$j" && grep -qE '^- id: owasp-asvs\s*$' "$j" && grep -qE '^- id: iso-27001-a14\s*$' "$j" && grep -qE '^- id: iso-27017\s*$' "$j" && echo ok 1>&2
